info.title: Kinora API
info.description: Kinora turns a book/PDF into a page-synced film generated a few seconds ahead of the reader. This document is generated from the single source-of-truth catalog at clients/spec/catalog.mjs. Do not edit by hand.

post.summary: Exchange credentials for a bearer access token.

200.description: Exchange credentials for a bearer access token.
Return the authenticated user.

post.summary: Upload a PDF/EPUB and trigger Phase-A ingest. Multipart form.

201.description: Upload a PDF/EPUB and trigger Phase-A ingest. Multipart form.

get.summary: List the books the current user owns (the shelf), newest first.

200.description: List the books the current user owns (the shelf), newest first.

get.summary: Fetch one book with its import status + progress.

200.description: Fetch one book with its import status + progress.

get.summary: A page's presigned image URL, text, and per-word boxes.

200.description: A page's presigned image URL, text, and per-word boxes.

get.summary: The book's canon graph: entities, continuity facts, markdown vault.

200.description: The book's canon graph: entities, continuity facts, markdown vault.

get.summary: The book's shots (the shot timeline) as a bare array.

200.description: The book's shots (the shot timeline) as a bare array.

get.summary: 302-redirect to the presigned cover image for an owned book.

302.description: 302-redirect to the presigned cover image for an owned book.

get.summary: Every event (scene) film — stitched URL + sync map + restore state.

200.description: Every event (scene) film — stitched URL + sync map + restore state.
One scene's film (partial load).

post.summary: Open a reading session against a book.

201.description: Open a reading session against a book.

get.summary: Return the Scheduler's live control state for a session.

200.description: Return the Scheduler's live control state for a session.

post.summary: Apply a debounced reading-intent update and run one control tick.

200.description: Apply a debounced reading-intent update and run one control tick.

post.summary: Jump to a word: cancel distant work, bridge keyframe, re-seed.

200.description: Jump to a word: cancel distant work, bridge keyframe, re-seed.

post.summary: Classify a Director region-comment, enqueue a regen, emit agent_activity.

200.description: Classify a Director region-comment, enqueue a regen, emit agent_activity.

post.summary: Edit a canon entity and surgically regen only the dependent shots.

200.description: Edit a canon entity and surgically regen only the dependent shots.

post.summary: Apply the Director's resolution of a surfaced continuity conflict.

200.description: Apply the Director's resolution of a surfaced continuity conflict.

get.summary: The session's conflict log — surfaced disputes + their resolutions.

200.description: The session's conflict log — surfaced disputes + their resolutions.

post.summary: DEV-ONLY: surface the canonical lost-sword conflict (local env only).

200.description: DEV-ONLY: surface the canonical lost-sword conflict (local env only).

get.summary: The reader's accumulated directing style across all their books.

200.description: The reader's accumulated directing style across all their books.

delete.summary: Clear the reader's learned directing style everywhere.

200.description: Clear the reader's learned directing style everywhere.

get.summary: The directing style learned for one book.

200.description: The directing style learned for one book.

delete.summary: Clear the directing style learned for one book.

200.description: Clear the directing style learned for one book.

get.summary: Recompute the watermark buffer sawtooth for a session (zero video-seconds).

parameters.name: velocity
parameters.description: Override reading velocity in words/sec (0 < v <= 40).

200.description: Recompute the watermark buffer sawtooth for a session (zero video-seconds).

get.summary: The cached crew-vs-baseline evaluation report for a book.

200.description: The cached crew-vs-baseline evaluation report for a book.

get.summary: Per book / session / model / operation USD rollup.

200.description: Per book / session / model / operation USD rollup.

get.summary: Compact cost/uptime summary for an in-app HUD.

200.description: Compact cost/uptime summary for an in-app HUD.

get.summary: SSE stream of a session's generation events.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Bearer token (SSE cannot set headers; pass it as a query param).

200.description: SSE stream of a session's generation events.

get.summary: SSE stream of ingest progress for the signed-in user's library.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Bearer token (SSE cannot set headers; pass it as a query param).

200.description: SSE stream of ingest progress for the signed-in user's library.

x-kinora-events.name: buffer_state
x-kinora-events.summary: Live committed-buffer state from one Scheduler control tick.

x-kinora-events.name: clip_ready
x-kinora-events.summary: A shot's clip finished rendering and is playable.

x-kinora-events.name: keyframe_ready
x-kinora-events.summary: A speculative keyframe still was generated for a beat.

x-kinora-events.name: scene_stitched
x-kinora-events.summary: A scene's accepted shots were stitched into one continuous film.

x-kinora-events.name: event_stitched
x-kinora-events.summary: An event-level film rollup (event == scene today).

x-kinora-events.name: agent_activity
x-kinora-events.summary: A crew agent did something visible (routing, canon write, arbitration).

x-kinora-events.name: regen_done
x-kinora-events.summary: A targeted regeneration completed; the fresh clip closes the loop.

x-kinora-events.name: budget_low
x-kinora-events.summary: The video-second budget is running low.

x-kinora-events.name: conflict_choice
x-kinora-events.summary: A continuity conflict was surfaced for the Director to resolve.

x-kinora-events.name: ingest_progress
x-kinora-events.summary: Phase-A ingest progress for a book on the user's library channel.

x-kinora-websocket.summary: Bidirectional Director channel: fans out the same SSE events and accepts client->backend messages (intent_update, seek, comment).

x-kinora-error-types.summary: An account with this email already exists.
No such book for this user.
No such session for this user.
No such shot in this session's book.
Document exceeds the per-book page limit.
Expected a PDF or EPUB upload.
Live video generation is gated off.
Action not permitted in this environment.
